trans-unit.note: Table Document Buffer N24 - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Amount - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Date Text - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Document No. - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Entry No. - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Item Category Code - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Item Description - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Item No. - Property Caption
Table Document Buffer N24 - Field Quantity - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Field %1 will not be updated on related assembly orders.\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: Pole %1 nie zostanie zaktualizowane na powiązanych zleceniach kompletacji.\Czy chcesz kontynuować?
trans-unit.note: %1 - "External Document No." caption
Codeunit AssemblyMgt N24 - Method CheckAssemblyBeforValidateExtDocumentNo - NamedType UpdateQst
Codeunit AssemblyMgt N24 - Method NotifyIfLocationisInProduction - NamedType NoAssemblySetupErr

trans-unit.source: You could not update %1 because assembly order is in progress or completed
trans-unit.target: Nie można zaktualizować pola %1, ponieważ zlecenie kompletacji jest w realizacji lub zakończone
trans-unit.note: %1 - Location Code
Codeunit AssemblyMgt N24 - Method NotifyIfLocationisInProduction - NamedType UpdateLineErr

trans-unit.source: This action may lead to an inconsistency in stock because item was transferred to production already.\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: Wykonywana czynność może prowadzić do niezgodności stanu magazynowego, ponieważ zapas był przesunięty do produkcji.\Czy chcesz kontynuować?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit AssemblyMgt N24 - Method ValidateInProdAssemblyLine - NamedType UpdateFieldQst
%1 - Ext. Document No.
Codeunit ExternalDocumentNoMgt N24 - Method CheckExternalDocNoAlreadyExistsAndCreatenewSalesLine - NamedType ExtDocNoLbl

trans-unit.source: External Document No. %1 has been found in %2 documents:\
trans-unit.target: Nr dokumentu zewnętrznego %1 był użyty w %2 dokumentach:
trans-unit.note: %1 - Ext. Doc. No, %2 - No. of documents
Codeunit ExternalDocumentNoMgt N24 - Method ExternalDocumentNoWasUsed - NamedType FoundDocMsg
%1 - Ext. Document No.
Codeunit ExternalDocumentNoMgt N24 - Method InsertSalesLineForExternalDocumentNo - NamedType ExtDocNoLbl
Codeunit SalesMgt N24 - Method InsertCommentsToPostedSaleslines - NamedType CommentsHeaderLbl

trans-unit.source: User must have "SUPER" permission set to perform this operation.
trans-unit.target: Użytkownik musi mieć przypisany zestaw uprawnień "SUPER", aby wykonać tą operację.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Security Helper N24 - Method ThrowErrorIfUserHasNotSuperPermissionSet - NamedType UserMustBeSuperErr

trans-unit.source: The date formula %1 cannot be positive.
trans-unit.target: Formuła daty nie może być dodatnia (wskazywać na przyszłość).
trans-unit.note: %1 - Date formula
Codeunit Shared Functions N24 - Method CheckDateFormulaNegative - NamedType DateFormulaCannotBePositiveErr
Codeunit Shared Labels N24 - Method GetProcessCompletedSuccessfullyLbl - NamedType ProcessCompletedSuccessfullyLbl
Page AssyOrderResidueSubform N24 - Property Caption
Page AssyOrderResidueSubform N24 - Action Residue - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Creates new records per residue with unit amount (75% of material amount).
trans-unit.target: Tworzy nowe wiersze dla odpadu z określoną kwotą za jednostkę (75% kwoty materiału).
trans-unit.note: Source text has changed. Please review the translation.
Page AssyOrderResidueSubform N24 - Action GetResidueLines - Property ToolTip
Page AssyOrderResidueSubform N24 - Action GetResidueLines - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Items by Location at Date Matrix
trans-unit.target: Zapasy wg lokalizacji na dzień - macierz
trans-unit.note: Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Property Caption
Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Action &Item - Property Caption
Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Action &Item Availability by - Property Caption
Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Action BOM Level - Property Caption
Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Action Event - Property Caption
Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Action Location - Property Caption
Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Action Period - Property Caption
Page Items by Loc. at Date Mtx N24 - Action Variant - Property Caption
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Property Caption
Code for unspecified location
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - NamedType UnspecifiedLocationCodeTxt
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control Options - Property Caption
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control InventoryAtDate - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the range of values that are displayed in the matrix window, for example, the total period. To change the contents of the field, choose Next Set or Previous Set.
trans-unit.target: Określa zakres wartości wyświetlanych w oknie macierzy, na przykład całkowity okres. Aby zmienić zawartość pola, wybierz Następny zestaw lub Poprzedni zestaw.
trans-unit.note: Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control MATRIX_CaptionRange - Property ToolTip
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control MATRIX_CaptionRange - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies that the names of columns are shown in the matrix window.
trans-unit.target: Określa, czy nazwy kolumn są wyświetlane w oknie macierzy.
trans-unit.note: Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control ShowColumnName - Property ToolTip
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control ShowColumnName - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the items in transit between locations.
trans-unit.target: Określa zapasy w drodze między lokalizacjami.
trans-unit.note: Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control ShowInTransit - Property ToolTip
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Control ShowInTransit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Go to the next set of data.
trans-unit.note: Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Action Next Set - Property ToolTip
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Action Next Set - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Go to the previous set of data.
trans-unit.note: Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Action Previous Set - Property ToolTip
Page Items by Location at Date N24 - Action Previous Set - Property Caption

Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType AmountForCompensationTxt
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType AndLbl

trans-unit.source: Compensation contains and applies to the following:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType CompensationContainsLbl

trans-unit.source: If you confirm Compensation Proposal, please sign it and return one copy back.
trans-unit.target: W przypadku potwierdzenia propozycji kompensaty prosimy o jej podpisanie i zwrot jednej kopii.
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType CompensationProposalMsg

trans-unit.source: 1. Monetary claim of company %1 to company %2 on basis of these documents:
trans-unit.target: 1. Roszczenia finansowe spółki %1 wobec spółki %2 wynikające z poniżej wymienionych dokumentów:
trans-unit.note: %1 - CompanyNameText, %2 - ContractorNameText
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType MonetaryClaim1Lbl

trans-unit.source: 2. Monetary claim of company %1 to company %2 on basis of these documents:
trans-unit.target: 2. Roszczenia finansowe spółki %1 wobec spółki %2 wynikające z poniżej wymienionych dokumentów:
trans-unit.note: %1 - CompanyNameText, %2 - ContractorNameText
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType MonetaryClaim2Lbl
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType OnbehalfofLbl
%1 - GenJournalLine."Document No.", %2 - GenJournalLine."Posting Date"
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType ProposalMainTitleLbl
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType RemainingAmountLbl
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType ResponsiblePersonLbl
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType SignatureLbl

trans-unit.source: Total amount in this compensation proposal is:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType TotalAmountLbl
Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType TotalLbl

trans-unit.source: Using this proposal we confirm that all legally required conditions have been satisfied for compensation of monetary claims between:
trans-unit.target: Niniejszą propozycją potwierdzamy, że zostały spełnione wszystkie wymagane przez prawo warunki kompensaty finansowej pomiędzy:
trans-unit.note: Report Compensation Proposal N24 - NamedType UsingThisProposalLbl
